jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at BankBazaar
jsonLd.description:
Join the BankBazaar family as a Frontend Developer in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BankBazaar:
BankBazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar!
